'''jovashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eucharistic|eucharistic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eucharistic|eucharistic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jovashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jovashithi|jovashithi]] || [[word:jovashiji|jovashiji]] || [[word:jovashishi|jovashishi]] || [[word:jovashiki|jovashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jovashuthuthu|jovashuthuthu]] || [[word:jovashujuju|jovashujuju]] || [[word:jovashushushu|jovashushushu]] || [[word:jovashukuku|jovashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jovashuthu|jovashuthu]] || [[word:jovashuju|jovashuju]] || [[word:jovashushu|jovashushu]] || [[word:jovashuku|jovashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jovashufthuf|jovashufthuf]] || [[word:jovashufjuf|jovashufjuf]] || [[word:jovashufshuf|jovashufshuf]] || [[word:jovashufkuf|jovashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jovashethe|jovashethe]] || [[word:jovasheje|jovasheje]] || [[word:jovasheshe|jovasheshe]] || [[word:jovasheke|jovasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jovashothotho|jovashothotho]] || [[word:jovashojojo|jovashojojo]] || [[word:jovashoshosho|jovashoshosho]] || [[word:jovashokoko|jovashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jovashotho|jovashotho]] || [[word:jovashojo|jovashojo]] || [[word:jovashosho|jovashosho]] || [[word:jovashoko|jovashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jovashofthof|jovashofthof]] || [[word:jovashofjof|jovashofjof]] || [[word:jovashofshof|jovashofshof]] || [[word:jovashofkof|jovashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jovashïfthïf|jovashïfthïf]] || [[word:jovashïfjïf|jovashïfjïf]] || [[word:jovashïfshïf|jovashïfshïf]] || [[word:jovashïfkïf|jovashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jovashïfthïfthïf|jovashïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:jovashïfjïfjïf|jovashïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:jovashïfshïfshïf|jovashïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:jovashïfkïfkïf|jovashïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jovashïfthïf|jovashïfthïf]] || [[word:jovashïfjïf|jovashïfjïf]] || [[word:jovashïfshïf|jovashïfshïf]] || [[word:jovashïfkïf|jovashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jovashïfthïf|jovashïfthïf]] || [[word:jovashïfjïf|jovashïfjïf]] || [[word:jovashïfshïf|jovashïfshïf]] || [[word:jovashïfkïf|jovashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jovashæthæ|jovashæthæ]] || [[word:jovashæjæ|jovashæjæ]] || [[word:jovashæshæ|jovashæshæ]] || [[word:jovashækæ|jovashækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jovashathatha|jovashathatha]] || [[word:jovashajaja|jovashajaja]] || [[word:jovashashasha|jovashashasha]] || [[word:jovashakaka|jovashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jovashatha|jovashatha]] || [[word:jovashaja|jovashaja]] || [[word:jovashasha|jovashasha]] || [[word:jovashaka|jovashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jovashafthaf|jovashafthaf]] || [[word:jovashafjaf|jovashafjaf]] || [[word:jovashafshaf|jovashafshaf]] || [[word:jovashafkaf|jovashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jovashasha|jovashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jovashësha|jovashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jovashrosha|jovashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jovashmusha|jovashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jovashyasha|jovashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojovashnkshësha|gojovashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojovashnkrosha|gojovashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojovashnkmusha|gojovashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojovashnkyasha|gojovashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jovavashasha|jovavashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jovavashësha|jovavashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jovavashrosha|jovavashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jovavashmusha|jovavashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jovavashyasha|jovavashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojovavashnkshësha|gojovavashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojovavashnkrosha|gojovavashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojovavashnkmusha|gojovavashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojovavashnkyasha|gojovavashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jevæshasha|jevæshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jevæshësha|jevæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jevæshrosha|jevæshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jevæshmusha|jevæshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jevæshyasha|jevæshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojevæshnkshësha|gojevæshnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojevæshnkrosha|gojevæshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojevæshnkmusha|gojevæshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojevæshnkyasha|gojevæshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jovfashasha|jovfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jovfashësha|jovfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jovfashrosha|jovfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jovfashmusha|jovfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jovfashyasha|jovfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojovfashnkshësha|gojovfashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojovfashnkrosha|gojovfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojovfashnkmusha|gojovfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojovfashnkyasha|gojovfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
